title: lithocarpus poculiformis
intro: Lithocarpus poculiformis, also known as the Chinese bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus poculiformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Lithocarpus poculiformis is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
